design-system.name: Design System
design-system.description: Complete visual token architecture — professional blue palette, dark mode, chat-specific tokens, typography, shadows, gradients, animations

frontend.role: Vite config with @tailwindcss/vite plugin for Tailwind v4
CSS variable tokens (light + dark), @theme inline block, base styles, keyframes, utility classes

design_decisions.vibe: Professional blue — trustworthy and polished for an AI product management chatbot
design_decisions.chat_tokens: user bubbles use primary blue, bot bubbles use muted/card surfaces

chat-ui.name: Chat UI
chat-ui.description: Full chat interface — message bubbles (user right, bot left), auto-scrolling message list, typing indicator with bouncing dots, auto-resizing input with send button, dark mode toggle, welcome state

frontend.role: Root component — manages messages state, loading state, sends messages via AI service
TypeScript interfaces for Message and ChatState
Header with PM Assistant branding, dark mode toggle, optional close button
Individual message bubble — user (blue, right) or bot (muted, left) with timestamp
3 bouncing dots in a bot-style bubble while AI responds
Auto-resizing textarea + send button, Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline
Scrollable message list with auto-scroll, typing indicator, and welcome empty state

components_used: Lucide icons (Bot, Moon, Sun, SendHorizontal, X, MessageCircle)
chat-ui.data_flow: User types message -> ChatInput.onSend -> App.handleSend -> adds user msg to state -> calls sendMessage() -> adds bot response to state -> ChatWindow re-renders

ai-service.name: AI Service
ai-service.description: OpenAnalyst API integration with comprehensive PM-only system prompt — restricts bot to product management topics, politely declines non-PM questions

frontend.role: System prompt defining PM expertise areas, response guidelines, and strict topic restriction
API service — POST to OpenAnalyst /messages endpoint, error handling for 429/401/500/network errors

ai-service.data_flow: App calls sendMessageStream(messages, {onChunk, onDone, onError}) -> ai.ts sends stream:true request -> parses SSE events -> onChunk delivers text deltas in real-time -> onDone fires with full text -> message saved to DB. Falls back to non-streaming on failure.

widget.name: Embeddable Widget
widget.description: Floating chat button + popup panel that can be embedded on any website via a script tag — self-contained with its own styles

frontend.role: Floating button (bottom-right) + popup chat panel with full chat UI, mobile-responsive
Widget entry point — self-mounts on any page, creates container, renders ChatWidget
Widget build config (--mode widget) — IIFE library format, outputs dist-widget/
Example HTML showing how to embed the widget with link + script tags
